content:
apiVersion: cert-manager.io/v1
kind: ClusterIssuer
metadata:
  name: "cloudflare"
spec:
  acme:
    email: "admin@example.net"
    server: "https://acme-v02.api.letsencrypt.org/directory"
    privateKeySecretRef:
      name: "cloudflare-acme-account-key"
    solvers:
      - dns01:
          cloudflare:
            apiTokenSecretRef:
              name: "cloudflare-api-token"
              key: "api-token"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "csp-strict"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  headers:
    contentSecurityPolicy: "default-src 'self'"
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "csp-admin"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  headers:
    contentSecurityPolicy: "default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'"
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "csp-workflow"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  headers:
    contentSecurityPolicy: "default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https:"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "traefik-dashboard-chain"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  chain:
    middlewares:
      - name: "forward-auth"
      - name: "security-headers"
      - name: "csp-admin"
---
apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: "traefik-dashboard"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  entryPoints:
    - "websecure"
  routes:
    - match: "Host(`traefik.example.net`)"
      kind: Rule
      middlewares:
        - name: "traefik-dashboard-chain"
      services:
        - name: api@internal
          kind: TraefikService
  tls:
    secretName: "wildcard-tls"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "forward-auth"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  forwardAuth:
    address: "http://forward-auth.edge-system.svc.cluster.local:4181"
    trustForwardHeader: true
    authResponseHeaders:
      - "X-Forwarded-User"
      - "X-Forwarded-Email"
      - "X-Forwarded-Groups"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - cluster-issuer-cloudflare.yaml
  - csp-profiles.yaml
  - dashboard.yaml
  - forward-auth.yaml
  - local-cert-file-provider.yaml
  - namespace.yaml
  - security-headers.yaml
  - traefik-default-tls.yaml
  - traefik-forward-auth-middleware.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: "traefik-local-cert-provider"
  namespace: "edge-system"
data:
  dynamic.yaml: |
    tls:
      certificates:
        - certFile: "/certs/tls.crt"
          keyFile: "/certs/tls.key"
      stores:
        default:
          defaultCertificate:
            certFile: "/certs/tls.crt"
            keyFile: "/certs/tls.key"

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: "edge-system"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "security-headers"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  headers:
    browserXssFilter: true
    contentTypeNosniff: true
    frameDeny: true
    referrerPolicy: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
    permissionsPolicy: "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()"
    stsSeconds: 31536000
    stsIncludeSubdomains: true
    stsPreload: true
    customResponseHeaders:
      X-Frame-Options: "DENY"
      X-Content-Type-Options: "nosniff"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: TLSStore
metadata:
  name: "default"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  defaultCertificate:
    secretName: "wildcard-tls"

apiVersion: traefik.io/v1alpha1
kind: Middleware
metadata:
  name: "forward-auth"
  namespace: "edge-system"
spec:
  forwardAuth:
    address: "http://forward-auth.edge-system.svc.cluster.local:4181"
    trustForwardHeader: true
    authResponseHeaders:
      - "X-Forwarded-User"
      - "X-Forwarded-Email"

apiVersion: kustomize.config.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Kustomization
resources:
  - api
  - frontend
